arts.ttl: Paul Warne makes three changes as he names Derby County team to face Sheffield United
arts.sum: Derby: Forsyth, Clarke, Nyambe, Jackson, Goudmijn, Ozoh, Adams, Osborn; Salvesen, Yates In midfield are Ozoh, Ebou Adams and Kenzo Goudmijn with Ben Osborn and Kayden Jackson also expected to feature across the middle of the park.

arts.sum: Derby County are hopeful of adding to their squad ahead of the transfer window closing on Monday. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: 2 sources claim player ‘about to be sold’ to Derby County – Medical tests pending before finalising transfer
arts.sum: Derby County are edging closer to completing the signing of Viking FK’s Sondre Langås in the winter market. That’s according to Aftenblad, who state the Norwegian club are ‘about to sell’ the 23-year-old to Derby County. Their title says Paul Warne’s side will pay a fee over NOK 50m [€4.26m] to Viking for the centre-back. The post 2 sources claim player ‘about to be sold’ to Derby County – Medical tests pending before finalising transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United Boss Chris Wilder on Visit to Pride Park: “We Have to Earn the Right to Play”
arts.sum: Sheffield United will travel to Pride Park this Saturday afternoon, hoping to take advantage of a depleted Derby County side. After suffering a shocking 3-0 defeat to Hull City, Chris Wilder’s men will be eager to return to winning ways against a Rams team in the midst of a severe slump. arts.ttl: Paul Warne sets-out Derby County stance on exits before transfer deadline
arts.sum: "I have not forced any of players out but my intention is that nobody else will leave and we will just add to the group we have got. But while the club is feverishly working behind the scenes to strengthen the squad as they target a midfielder and a winger for the final time this season, there have been question marks over some of the fringe players.

Derby had made it clear they did not want to sell the 23-year-old, but the club considered the player's wishes and, allied with the fee on offer, the deal was the best conclusion for all parties.

arts.ttl: Derby County close in on £4m transfer as Rams set to raid Viking FK again
arts.sum: Derby County are reportedly closing in on a second raid on Viking FK for Norwegian centre-back Sondre Langas. Langas has been described as a right-sided ball-playing centre-back and would help fill the void left by Eiran Cashin who is closing in on a move to Premier League Brighton for around £10m.
